problem.summary: Sum an array of floats into one scalar. The baseline atomically adds every element to one global output. The optimized version reduces within each block and performs one atomic add per block.
outputs: output[0] contains the sum of input values
constraints: input values in the seed harness are chosen for stable correctness checks

verification.method: Compare against CPU reference with absolute tolerance appropriate for input range. The 16777216-element gfx1201 HIP runs passed with max_abs_error=0.

curation.notes: Ported from the CUDA corpus on 2026-05-20. On 2026-05-28, AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201 HIP-event timing measured 36.872601 ms baseline versus 2.19150 ms optimized for a 16777216-element fp32 sum, speedup 16.825280x. No rocprofiler/rocprof counters were collected.
